Compliance.description: SARB PA, FSCA FSP, major bank fully licensed; strong governance & compliance record.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.1/5; iOS 4.7/5; mixed; high complaint volume typical of large banks.

Product Value.description: Wide range; eBucks rewards strong; fees considered high by some; premium accounts pricey.

Innovation.description: Nav Money, PayShap, eBucks ecosystem, first SA super app concepts, open banking.

Customer Support.description: 24/7 call, branch, chat; high complaint volumes but resolution exists.

Accessibility & Security.description: Leading digital access; multiple fraud/phishing incidents; strong app security, but breach exposure.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Easy Zero R0/mo; Aspire from R109; Premier from R199; Personal from R275

socialSentiment.summary: eBucks praised; fees and fraud complaints common.
